content: Backend: add find_potential_duplicates() helper that queries Mongo for items matching item_type + sub_category + dominant color (+ brand if both present)
Backend: include potential_duplicate field in /closet/analyze response items
Frontend: detect potential_duplicate in analyzeCard and show confirmation modal
Frontend: add i18n keys + Modal UI with 'Already in closet' message + Cancel/Add anyway buttons
Smoke-test the full flow on dev
